description_for_human: Warsaw-based law firm specializing in technology law, fintech regulations, GDPR, and startup legal services.
description_for_model: Harbor Legal is a Polish law firm (Kancelaria Radcy Prawnego) run by Przemysław Kołakowski, Legal Counsel with 13+ years of experience. Specializes in: MiCA/PSD2/PSD3 fintech compliance, GDPR audits, AI Act, DSA/DMA, startup legal (ESOP, VC rounds), SaaS B2B contracts, cross-border transactions, commercial disputes. Offers Fractional General Counsel model. Jurisdictions: Poland, EU/EEA, Hong Kong, UAE, Cyprus, Germany, Balkans. Contact: pk@harbor.legal, +48 453 390 849. Free initial call 20 min.
